caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with white text that reads "I CAN NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" is speaking into a professional microphone. He is in a room featuring a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt and grey pants in the background. A clothing rack and a black office chair are also visible. Throughout the sequence, the man is smiling and laughing, gesturing with his right hand. On-screen, a red and white logo is visible in the bottom left corner, along with the text "RED VELVET" in red letters in the bottom right. The scene progresses as the man shifts his expression from a wide smile to laughter while moving his hand to point and emphasize his speech.
